title: Nestle India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Nestle India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Nestle India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nestle India:
Nestle India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nestle India!
